sections.paragraph:
σαρϰιϰός, ή, όν [σάρξ] ‘belonging to worldly matters or conditions’

—a. w. focus on a thing and in a neutral sense material, ordinary, everyday Ro 15:27; 1 Cor 9:11.

—b. w. focus on limitation to worldly perspective as opposed to moral/spiritual orientation, worldly, merely human Ro 7:14 v.l.; 1 Cor 3:1 v.l., 3, 4 v.l.; 2 Cor 1:12; 10:4; Hb 7:16 v.l.; 1 Pt 2:11.
